constraints: Use @supabase/ssr exclusively for auth; call getUser() in server components and middleware — never getSession() in server components
All case list tables must configure TanStack Table v8 with manualSorting: true, manualFiltering: true, manualPagination: true — no client-side sorting, filtering, or pagination of backend data
Filter, sort, and pagination state for all tables must be persisted in URL query parameters using nuqs

The typed API client must be generated from FastAPI /openapi.json using @hey-api/openapi-ts; the generation command must be a npm script (e.g. npm run generate-client); no hand-written API fetch wrappers are permitted for backend endpoints
The clinical assessment form must use react-hook-form v7 with a Zod schema covering all 20+ fields; field-level validation errors must display inline without full-page reload
Quick-edit drawers must use shadcn/ui Sheet component — not Drawer, Modal, or Dialog
The spreadsheet import flow UI must use react-spreadsheet-import for column mapping and row preview
Tailwind v4 configuration must use tw-animate-css package — not tailwindcss-animate

StatusBadge must use a STATUS_CONFIG map keyed by the PatientCase status enum; the map must be defined such that TypeScript exhaustiveness checking produces a compile error if a new status is added without a corresponding config entry
The 'Select For Outreach' contextual prompt ('Ready to create outreach? Go to Outreach tab →') must appear after the coordinator selects at least one facility and must include a tab navigation action
The re-match warning modal must require explicit confirmation before POST /api/v1/cases/{case_id}/matches/generate is called when existing matches are present
phone_manual and task outreach actions must atomically advance case state to pending_facility_response in a single UI action with no intermediate approval step shown to the user

The Audit tab must only be rendered in the DOM for admin role; other roles must not receive audit log data even if they attempt direct API calls (enforcement is backend — frontend must also conditionally render the tab)
All API error states (4xx, 5xx, network timeout) must be handled with user-visible error messages; silent failures are not permitted
